name: ollama-cloud-provider
description: Security-hardened Ollama Cloud language model provider for VS Code Copilot Chat.

ollamaCloud.apiKey.description: Ollama Cloud API key fallback. Prefer the command palette to store it securely in SecretStorage.

ollamaCloud.baseUrl.description: Ollama Cloud OpenAI-compatible API base URL. Must be in allowedBaseUrls or the extension refuses to start.

ollamaCloud.allowedBaseUrls.description: Whitelist of permitted base URLs. The extension refuses to send requests to any baseUrl not in this list.

ollamaCloud.requestTimeoutMs.description: Request timeout in milliseconds for chat completions.

ollamaCloud.maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retries for transient failures (429, 5xx). Uses exponential backoff.

id.description: Stable connection id. Used as the SecretStorage key suffix (ollamaCloud.apiKey.<id>) and the model id prefix.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the model picker origin tag.

type.description: Connection type. Drives the origin label (Cloud/Local/VPS/custom) and the default allowedBaseUrls.

enabled.description: Whether the connection is enabled. Disabled connections are skipped.

openaiCompatiblePath.description: OpenAI-compatible path suffix appended to baseUrl. Defaults to empty (baseUrl already includes /v1).

allowedBaseUrls.description: Per-connection whitelist. The extension refuses to send the connection's API key to any baseUrl not in this list. Defaults to [baseUrl] (fail-closed).

visionModels.description: Per-connection vision wildcard patterns. A model id matching any pattern is treated as image-capable.

requiresApiKey.description: Whether an API key is required for this connection. Defaults to true for cloud/remote/custom, false for local.

ollamaCloud.connections.description: Multi-connection list. Each entry is a distinct OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Cloud, Local, VPS, or custom) with its own allowedBaseUrls whitelist and API key. When empty, the extension uses the legacy single-connection settings.

ollamaCloud.visionModels.description: Global vision wildcard patterns. A model id matching any pattern is treated as image-capable. Per-connection visionModels override this list for that connection's models.

scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run compile && npm test
